title: Marvin configuration
description: Reusable analysis settings for the Marvin AWS Cost Explorer CSV CLI.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint for JSON Schema validation.

total_budget.description: Warn when total filtered spend exceeds this amount.

growth_limit_percent.description: Warn when month-over-month growth exceeds this percentage.

from_month.description: Include records from this month onward. Format: YYYY-MM.

min_service_spend.description: Hide service rows below this spend amount. Zero means no threshold.

to_month.description: Include records through this month. Format: YYYY-MM.

top_services.description: Limit service rows in report output. Zero means no limit.

include_services.description: Services to include in totals, warnings, and report output.

ignore_services.description: Services to exclude from totals, warnings, and report output.

service_budgets.description: Map of service name to budget amount.
